query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_leads,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'aguardando_atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as aguardando,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'em_atendimento' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as em_atendimento,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'agendado' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as agendado,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'contrato_fechado' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as contrato_fechado
FROM leads;
